title: hearth.design.generated v1
description: Forge visualization result emitted by deer-flow DesignRequestBusConsumer after calling POST /api/forge/visualize. image_url is relative to the deer-flow gateway. Android should call the proxy endpoint via hearth-api. Producer: deer-flow/backend/.../design_request_consumer.py. Consumers: hearth-api nbus_consumer (SSE forwarding to Android), Android app (ForgeSection card refresh).

entity_key.description: Required. Echoed from the triggering hearth.command.design_request.v1 event.

mode.description: Required. Rendering mode used for generation — 'image' for a raster output, 'blueprint' for SVG.

requester.description: Required. Echoed from the triggering hearth.command.design_request.v1 event.

request_event_id.description: Required. The `id` field from the triggering hearth.command.design_request.v1 CloudEvents envelope, used for correlation.

session_id.description: Optional. Forge session UUID that was used or created during generation.

image_url.description: Optional. Path to retrieve the generated image from the deer-flow gateway (e.g. /api/forge/sessions/{id}/trial-card). Android must proxy via hearth-api.

blueprint_svg.description: Optional. Inline SVG content when mode=blueprint and the SVG is small enough to embed directly.

error.description: Optional. If generation failed, a human-readable reason. Present iff generation did not succeed.
